conservative.name: Gehenna's Golden Golem
conservative.requirements:
10 power
You toss a golden coin into the air as part of casting this spell - the coin is consumed

success.description: A massive golden golem appears engaged with you. It moves with you and protects you while this spell is recharging. Each time you suffer damage, you may remove any amount of recharge tokens from this card to increase your soak value by the same amount as the golem interposes itself between you and danger

sigmarsComet.description: While this spell is recharging, your Defence value is increased by your depth in the Conservative stance

reckless.name: Gehenna's Golden Golem
reckless.requirements:
10 power
You toss a golden coin into the air as part of casting this spell - the coin is consumed

success.description: A massive golden golem appears engaged with you. It moves with you and protects you while this spell is recharging. Each time you suffer damage, you may remove any amount of recharge tokens from this card to increase your soak value by the same amount as the golem interposes itself between you and danger

sigmarsComet.description: You may remove 4 recharge tokens from this card to allow your golem to make a Melee Strike attack with Strength equal to your Intelligence and a Damage Rating of 6. Do this only on your turn and only once per round
